g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is stored in the GitHub repo?')
sendPrompt('What does Terraform provision in this project?')
sendPrompt('What is stored in Artifact Registry?')
sendPrompt('How does ArgoCD sync from GitHub?')
sendPrompt('What app is running in the default namespace?')
sendPrompt('How does the LoadBalancer service work on GKE?')
sendPrompt('What does the Prometheus operator do?')
sendPrompt('What metrics does Prometheus scrape in this cluster?')
sendPrompt('What dashboards are loaded in Grafana?')
